name: 3-Day Tour: Marrakech → Erg Chigaga & M'Hamid El Ghizlane (4x4)

seo.title: 3-Day Marrakech to M'Hamid Erg Chigaga Tour — Wild Desert by 4x4 | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: 3-day 4x4 tour from Marrakech: Ait Ben Haddou, Draa Valley, M'Hamid El Ghizlane and the wild dunes of Erg Chigaga. Night in a desert camp under the stars.

hero.tagline: The wild dunes of Erg Chigaga by 4x4

intro: This 3-day 4x4 tour takes you to the remote dunes of Erg Chigaga, one of Morocco's largest ergs, only accessible by 4x4 from M'Hamid El Ghizlane. An ideal itinerary for travellers seeking adventure and an authentic desert experience, far from the classic tourist routes.
